items.title: Israeli forces kill Palestinian couple and two of their children in occupied West Bank
items.dek: Mohammed, aged five, and Othman, aged seven, were killed alongside their parents, the Palestinian health ministry says.
items.body: Mohammed, aged five, and Othman, aged seven, were killed alongside their parents, the Palestinian health ministry says.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Severe flooding kills 62 in Kenya, as heavy rains continue
items.dek: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.
items.body: Eleven people were rescued overnight after a minibus taxi got stuck in rising floodwaters in Nairobi.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: US names six crew killed in refuelling plane crash in Iraq
items.dek: The aircraft was on a combat mission as part of ongoing US operations against Iran when it crashed in western Iraq on Thursday.
items.body: The aircraft was on a combat mission as part of ongoing US operations against Iran when it crashed in western Iraq on Thursday.
items.author: IriLine Desk
